creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
I'll note that the complaint in:

https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-ports/2024-December/007035.html

about:

https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/ampere2/data/main-arm64-default/peb87cb7f3aa2_saf66ffbf69e/logs/onnxruntime-1.18.2_1.log

not showing up at https://portsfallout.com/ would also apply to
it not showing up at:

https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-pkg-fallout/2024-December/date.html

which also does not list it.

The problem with https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-pkg-fallout/
not listing everything is freeBSD related and tied to FreeBSD
repositories and projects, independently of https://portsfallout.com/
or other such that uses what FreeBSD publishes.

This seems appropriate to submit to FreeBSD's bugzilla someplace.
If this was fixed, it might well automatically fix what is
presented by the likes of https://portsfallout.com/ , at least
for any new reporting to
https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-pkg-fallout/ that was
later generated.
